name: Oi Muchim (Korean Spicy Cucumber Salad)
description: Crisp, juicy cucumber tossed with a sweet-spicy-savory seasoning — a classic Korean banchan ready in minutes.
recipeInstructions: Halve the cucumbers lengthwise and slice diagonally into thin pieces; put in a large bowl.
Add onion, scallion, garlic, gochugaru, soy sauce, sesame oil, sesame seeds, and sugar.
Mix well until the sugar dissolves. Best mixed just before serving so it stays crisp and doesn't get watery.
author: Maangchi
